title: The Best of Enemies
writer: Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Agenore Incrocci, Jack Pulman
actors: David Niven, Alberto Sordi, Amedeo Nazzari
plot: In 1941 during the desert war in Abyssinia the Italian captain Blasi and the British major Richardson alternate between being bitter enemies or best friends depending on the circumstances.
awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 1 win & 6 nominations total
